completed.description: Whether the reindex task has completed. Present when `wait_for_completion=true`.

id.description: The ID of the reindex task. The value is the ID assigned when the task was first created and remains stable across node-shutdown relocations. Present when `wait_for_completion=true`.

description.description: A sanitized description of the reindex operation.

start_time_in_millis.description: The time at which the reindex task started, in milliseconds since the Unix epoch.

start_time.description: The time at which the reindex task started, as an ISO 8601 formatted string.

running_time.description:
The elapsed running time of the reindex task, in a human-readable format.
Only present when the request includes the `?human=true` query parameter.

running_time_in_nanos.description: The elapsed running time of the reindex task, in nanoseconds.

cancelled.description: Whether the reindex task has been cancelled.

status.description: The status of the reindex operation at the time of cancellation.

error.description: The error that caused the reindex task to fail, if any.

response.description: The final result of the reindex operation, if it completed before being cancelled.
